name: Columbus Circle Capital Corp II
business: Columbus Circle Capital Corp II is a blank check company incorporated in the Cayman Islands on April 3, 2025, formed for the purpose of effecting a business combination with one or more businesses. As of the date of this Report, it has not selected any specific business combination target and has generated no operating revenues. It completed its Initial Public Offering on February 12, 2026, selling 23,000,000 units at $10.00 per unit, generating gross proceeds of $230,000,000.

exposures.sentence: Businesses in high growth sectors in Europe or North America that operate in AI and digital infrastructure, sports, media and entertainment, healthcare, energy transition, mining or cryptocurrency.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial Business Combination
catalysts.sentence: We must complete our initial Business Combination by (i) February 12, 2028, the end of our Combination Period, which is 24 months from the closing of our Initial Public Offering, (ii) such earlier liquidation date as our Board may approve or (iii) such later date as our shareholders may approve pursuant to the Amended and Restated Articles.

tamClaims.claim: AI is projected to contribute $15.7 trillion to global GDP by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: AI is projected to contribute a staggering $15.7 trillion to the global GDP by 2030, a 14% increase.

tamClaims.claim: Global sports market projected to reach $680 billion by 2028.
tamClaims.sentence: The global sports market is projected to reach $680 billion by 2028, while the overall entertainment and media (E&M) market is expected to exceed $3.4 trillion.

tamClaims.claim: Entertainment and media market expected to exceed $3.4 trillion.
tamClaims.sentence: The global sports market is projected to reach $680 billion by 2028, while the overall entertainment and media (E&M) market is expected to exceed $3.4 trillion.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. health expenditure reached $5.0 trillion in 2024, projected to be 19.7% of GDP by 2032.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2024, estimated annual U.S. health expenditure reached $5.0 trillion, and by 2032, U.S. healthcare expenditure as a percent of GDP is projected to reach 19.7%.

tamClaims.claim: Energy transition market size projected to reach $2.8 trillion in 2024 and $5.4 trillion by 2031.
tamClaims.sentence: The global market size is projected to reach $2.8 trillion in 2024 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 9.7% from 2024 to 2031, reaching a projected $5.4 trillion.

tamClaims.claim: Global mining market projected to reach $3.0 trillion by 2029.
tamClaims.sentence: The global mining market is projected to reach $3.0 trillion by 2029, driven by increasing demand for critical minerals essential for the energy transition and digital technologies.

tamClaims.claim: Global cryptocurrency market projected to grow to $15.4 billion by 2032.
tamClaims.sentence: The global cryptocurrency market is projected to grow to $15.4 billion by 2032, with an annual growth rate of 13.1% from 2024 to 2032.
